strengths: Has access to quality instructional content demonstrating proper technique
weaknesses: Submitted instructional video instead of actual task performance
Cannot assess current skill level without performance data

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: Practice opening the ligating loop and positioning it around the target appendage before tightening, using the techniques shown in the instructional video.
drills.targets_weakness: Need to demonstrate actual task performance rather than viewing instruction.

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause to verify proper alignment, then cinch down while maintaining position accuracy.
drills.targets_weakness: Building confidence to attempt the actual task after instruction.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, you should transition from studying technique to performing the actual task. Submit a performance attempt of task 3 to receive targeted feedback on your ligating loop skills.
